sourcesContent:
a = 5
b = 0
c = null
flag = a?!
gone = c?!
zero = b?!
obj = { v: 1 }
m = obj.v?!
list = [a?!, b?!, c?!]
combo = b?! ?? "absent"
neg = not b?!
eq = a?! == true
paren = (a + b)?!
text = "#{a?!}"
probe = (v) -> v?!
r1 = probe(0)
r2 = probe("x")
keep = if a?!
  "yes"
else
  "no"
out = [flag, gone, zero, m, combo, neg, eq, paren, text, r1, r2, keep]
